zo_reasoning: Meeting focuses on Skybridge/Alpic as deployment platforms for MCP apps, with ChatGPT App Store as new distribution channel. V committed to prototyping a career coaching app using Skybridge in 24-48 hours, indicating active evaluation of partnership potential. Zo ecosystem (130-140 members) identified as target audience for MCP tools.
careerspan_reasoning: Mentions 'Plan Z' for Careerspan (open-source + bring-your--key hosted version) and potential ChatGPT App Store distribution as alternative to acquisition. While relevant to Careerspan's go-to-market options, this is a contingency/fallback discussion rather than acquisition advancement.

summary: Intro meeting with Skybridge/Alpic exploring MCP deployment infrastructure for ChatGPT App Store. V prototyping Skybridge for Zo ecosystem integration; Careerspan mentioned as potential ChatGPT app but primarily as part of 'Plan Z' fallback strategy.
